title: crocus annulatus var. biflorus
intro: Crocus annulatus var. biflorus, also known as the double-flowered annulus crocus, is a variant of the Crocus annulatus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the iris family. The medicinal properties of Crocus annulatus var. biflorus include its use as a natural anti-inflammatory agent and its ability to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its use as a natural remedy for reducing inflammation and improving circulation. Herbal preparations of Crocus annulatus var. biflorus include tinctures and infusions, which can be used to make teas or added to other herbal remedies for their medicinal properties.
